title: Lamb Kebabs with Spicy Yogurt Sauce
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired dish featuring lamb kebabs served with a tangy yogurt sauce. Perfect for a warm evening.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (such as onions, bell peppers, and mushrooms)

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, spicy sauce, garam masala, cumin powder, coriander powder, salt, and black pepper.
2. Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
4. Thread the lamb cubes and vegetables onto skewers.
5. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked through.
6. Serve the kebabs hot with the yogurt sauce for dipping.
7. Garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
